key_risks: HIGH: Unexpected capability for formatter skill: network (M1)

findings.title: Outbound network request
findings.description: Code makes outbound network request via metrics.get()
findings.remediation: Verify the request target is expected and trusted.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for formatter skill: network
findings.description: A 'formatter' skill would not normally require 'network' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: file_read, file_write
findings.remediation: Review why a formatter skill needs network access.
